apps.name: qBittorrent
apps.description: Popular, feature-rich BitTorrent client with a clean web UI.

apps.name: Transmission
apps.description: Lightweight, cross-platform BitTorrent client.

apps.name: Deluge
apps.description: Highly extensible BitTorrent client with a rich plugin ecosystem.

apps.name: SABnzbd
apps.description: Best-in-class Usenet NZB downloader with post-processing.

apps.name: NZBGet
apps.description: Efficient, highly optimised Usenet downloader.

apps.name: JDownloader 2
apps.description: Java-based download manager supporting 100s of file hosters.

apps.name: pyLoad
apps.description: Free, open-source download manager written in Python.

apps.name: Aria2 Pro
apps.description: Multi-protocol & multi-source command-line download utility.

apps.name: Pinchflat
apps.description: Self-hosted YouTube and media subscription manager with automatic downloads.

apps.name: qbitrr
apps.description: Companion app for qBittorrent, Radarr, and Sonarr — manages queue and removes stalled downloads.

apps.name: Prowlarr
apps.description: Indexer manager and proxy supporting many torrent and Usenet trackers.

apps.name: Radarr
apps.description: Movie collection manager. Integrates with download clients and media servers.

apps.name: Sonarr
apps.description: Smart PVR for TV shows. Searches, downloads, and manages your TV library.

apps.name: Lidarr
apps.description: Music collection manager. Automatically downloads music to your library.

apps.name: Bazarr
apps.description: Companion app to Sonarr and Radarr for automatic subtitle management.

apps.name: Whisparr
apps.description: Adult content collection manager. Part of the ARR family.

apps.name: Readarr
apps.description: Book/eBook collection manager. Like Sonarr but for books.

apps.name: Mylar3
apps.description: Automated comic book downloader for CBZ/CBR files.

apps.name: Doplarr
apps.description: Discord bot for requesting media via Overseerr, Radarr, and Sonarr.
apps.notes: Requires Discord bot token and Sonarr/Radarr API keys post-deploy.

apps.name: Boxarr
apps.description: Physical media collection manager — track box sets alongside your digital library.
apps.notes: Tracks physical box sets (DVDs/Blu-rays) alongside your Radarr/Sonarr library.

apps.name: Recyclarr
apps.description: Syncs TRaSH Guide quality profiles and settings to Sonarr and Radarr.

apps.name: Unpackerr
apps.description: Extracts downloaded archives for Radarr, Sonarr, Lidarr, and Readarr.

apps.name: Notifiarr
apps.description: Unified notification and integration hub for your ARR stack.

apps.name: Jellyfin
apps.description: Free, open-source media server. No subscriptions, no tracking.

apps.name: Plex Media Server
apps.description: Feature-rich media server with apps for almost every device.

apps.name: Emby
apps.description: Personal media server with live TV, DVR, and subtitle support.

apps.name: Navidrome
apps.description: Modern, lightweight music server compatible with Subsonic/Airsonic clients.

apps.name: Kavita
apps.description: Manga, comics, and book server with reading progress tracking.

apps.name: Komga
apps.description: Media server for comics, manga, and graphic novels with OPDS support.

apps.name: Audiobookshelf
apps.description: Self-hosted audiobook and podcast server with app support.

apps.name: Tdarr
apps.description: Distributed media transcoding automation with health checks and GPU support.

apps.name: FileFlows
apps.description: File processing system with a visual flow editor for media conversion.

apps.name: HandBrake
apps.description: Video transcoder GUI accessible via web browser.

apps.name: Kometa (Plex Meta Manager)
apps.description: Automates Plex collection and metadata management using YAML configs.
apps.notes: Configure Plex connection in /config/config.yml before starting.

apps.name: Wizarr
apps.description: Automatic user invitation and onboarding system for Plex and Jellyfin.

apps.name: Jellystat
apps.description: Statistics and activity tracking dashboard for Jellyfin.

apps.name: Seerr
apps.description: Unified media request manager — successor to Jellyseerr and Overseerr.
apps.notes: Replaces Overseerr and Jellyseerr. Supports Jellyfin, Plex, and Emby.

apps.name: Ombi
apps.description: User-facing media request portal for Plex, Emby, and Jellyfin.

apps.name: Requestrr
apps.description: Discord bot for requesting movies and TV shows via Radarr/Sonarr.

apps.name: Tautulli
apps.description: Monitoring and tracking tool for Plex Media Server.

apps.name: FlareSolverr
apps.description: Proxy server to bypass Cloudflare and DDoS-Guard protection.

apps.name: Grafana
apps.description: Open observability platform for metrics, logs, and traces visualization.

apps.name: Prometheus
apps.description: Systems monitoring and alerting toolkit with time-series database.

apps.name: Uptime Kuma
apps.description: Fancy self-hosted monitoring tool with status pages and notifications.

apps.name: Netdata
apps.description: Real-time, high-resolution system performance monitoring.

apps.name: Glances
apps.description: Cross-platform system monitoring tool with a web interface.

apps.name: Dozzle
apps.description: Realtime Docker log viewer with a clean, searchable web interface.

apps.name: Portainer CE
apps.description: Docker management GUI with stacks, container management, and user roles.

apps.name: Watchtower
apps.description: Automatically updates running Docker containers when new images are available.

apps.name: Scrutiny
apps.description: Hard drive health dashboard using S.M.A.R.T. data with alerts.

apps.name: Speedtest Tracker
apps.description: Self-hosted internet speed test tracker with historical graphing.

apps.name: Homer
apps.description: Simple, static homepage for your homelab services.

apps.name: Homarr
apps.description: Sleek, modern dashboard with drag-and-drop, service integrations, and widgets.

apps.name: Dasherr
apps.description: Minimal, lightweight app dashboard with customizable layout.

apps.name: Flame
apps.description: Self-hosted startpage and application dashboard with bookmarks.

apps.name: Heimdall
apps.description: Application dashboard with search functionality and enhanced app tiles.

apps.name: Organizr
apps.description: HTPC/homelab organizer with tabbed interface and user authentication.

apps.name: Traefik
apps.description: Cloud-native reverse proxy and load balancer with auto SSL.
apps.notes: Requires traefik.yml config in {CONFIG}/traefik/ before starting.

apps.name: Nginx Proxy Manager
apps.description: Easiest way to manage Nginx proxy hosts with SSL via Let's Encrypt.

apps.name: Caddy
apps.description: Modern web server with automatic HTTPS, simple configuration.

apps.name: SWAG
apps.description: Secure Web Application Gateway: Nginx + Certbot + Fail2ban in one container.
apps.notes: Set URL, SUBDOMAINS, and VALIDATION env vars before starting.

apps.name: WireGuard
apps.description: Fast, modern VPN tunnel. Use as a VPN server or client.

apps.name: Tailscale
apps.description: Zero-config mesh VPN built on WireGuard. Connect all your devices.
apps.notes: Set TS_AUTHKEY from your Tailscale admin console before starting.

apps.name: Gluetun
apps.description: VPN client container for 20+ providers. Route other containers through it.
apps.notes: Set VPN_SERVICE_PROVIDER and credentials before starting.

apps.name: WG-Easy
apps.description: Easiest WireGuard VPN server with a beautiful web UI for peer management.
apps.notes: Set WG_HOST to your server's public IP or domain.

apps.name: AdGuard Home
apps.description: Network-wide ad and tracker blocking DNS server.
apps.notes: Port 53 may conflict with systemd-resolved. Disable it first.

apps.name: Pi-hole
apps.description: DNS-based ad blocker for your entire network.

apps.name: Technitium DNS
apps.description: Self-hosted authoritative DNS server with ad blocking and split horizon.

apps.name: n8n
apps.description: Workflow automation tool with 350+ integrations. Like Zapier, self-hosted.

apps.name: Huginn
apps.description: Create agents that monitor the web and act on your behalf.

apps.name: Changedetection.io
apps.description: Monitor websites for changes and receive notifications.

apps.name: Node-RED
apps.description: Flow-based programming for visual wiring of IoT hardware and APIs.

apps.name: Activepieces
apps.description: Open-source Zapier alternative with no-code automation flows.

apps.name: Nextcloud
apps.description: Self-hosted productivity platform: files, calendar, contacts, and more.

apps.name: File Browser
apps.description: Web-based file manager with user management and sharing.

apps.name: Syncthing
apps.description: Continuous file synchronization between devices. No cloud required.

apps.name: Paperless-ngx
apps.description: Document management system that transforms scans into searchable documents.
apps.notes: For full functionality, add a Redis container and set PAPERLESS_REDIS.

apps.name: Immich
apps.description: High-performance self-hosted photo and video backup solution.

apps.name: PhotoPrism
apps.description: AI-powered photo management with face recognition and geo-tagging.

apps.name: Stirling PDF
apps.description: Locally hosted web-based PDF manipulation tool with 30+ operations.

apps.name: Vaultwarden
apps.description: Unofficial Bitwarden-compatible password manager server. Lightweight.

apps.name: Authentik
apps.description: Open-source identity provider with SSO, OAuth2, and LDAP support.

apps.name: Authelia
apps.description: Open-source authentication and authorization server with 2FA/MFA.

apps.name: CrowdSec
apps.description: Crowd-sourced security engine that detects and blocks malicious IPs.

apps.name: ntfy
apps.description: Simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service. Push to any device.

apps.name: Gotify
apps.description: Simple server for sending and receiving notification messages.

apps.name: Matrix Synapse
apps.description: Open, decentralized real-time communication server.
apps.notes: Generate config first: docker run --rm -v {CONFIG}/matrix:/data -e SYNAPSE_SERVER_NAME=matrix.yourdomain.com matrixdotorg/synapse:latest generate

apps.name: Gitea
apps.description: Lightweight self-hosted Git service. Like GitHub, locally.

apps.name: Code Server
apps.description: Run VS Code in the browser on your server. Code from anywhere.

apps.name: Drone CI
apps.description: Container-native continuous integration and delivery platform.

apps.name: MariaDB
apps.description: MySQL-compatible relational database. Used by many homelab apps.

apps.name: PostgreSQL
apps.description: Advanced open-source relational database with JSON support.

apps.name: Redis
apps.description: In-memory data structure store. Used as cache/message broker.

apps.name: MongoDB
apps.description: Document-oriented NoSQL database for flexible data storage.

apps.name: Mealie
apps.description: Self-hosted recipe manager and meal planner with import from any URL.

apps.name: Grocy
apps.description: Grocery and household management system with barcode scanning.

apps.name: FreshRSS
apps.description: Self-hosted RSS feed aggregator with multi-user support.

apps.name: Wallabag
apps.description: Self-hosted read-it-later application with offline access.

apps.name: Linkding
apps.description: Self-hosted bookmark manager with tags, search, and browser extensions.

apps.name: Calibre-Web
apps.description: Web-based eBook library browser and reader with OPDS support.

apps.name: Actual Budget
apps.description: Self-hosted personal finance app. Local-first budgeting that syncs.

apps.name: CyberChef
apps.description: The Cyber Swiss Army Knife. Encode, decode, encrypt, analyse data in the browser.

apps.name: ArrHub WebUI
apps.description: Built-in server monitoring and Docker management dashboard on port 9999.
apps.notes: Built from local Dockerfile. Run 'media → WebUI Control → Rebuild' after updates.
